===================
===================
Bob Dylan with Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers
10 September 1987
St. Jakobshalle, Basel, Switzerland

Master>CDr(x)>EAC(secure)>FLAC(level8)>Dime

CD1 66:17.53

1. Forever Young [5:42.69]
2. Shelter From The Storm [4:12.20]
3. Seeing The Real You At Last [4:17.35]
4. When The Night Comes Falling From The Sky [6:21.16]
5. Queen Jane Approximately [5:02.11]
6. When I Paint My Masterpiece [5:11.36]
7. The Ballad Of Frankie Lee And Judas Priest [4:39.44]
8. Clean-Cut Kid [2:39.72]
9. I Want You [3:53.26]
10. Masters Of War [3:35.36]
11. I Shall Be Released [4:31.40]
12. Trust Yourself [3:26.51]
13. In The Garden [7:28.11]
14. Like A Rolling Stone [5:15.36] 

Complete Dylan set.
